# /create-issues

## Purpose
Split an Epic into implementation issues with declared change targets.

## When To Use
When the Epic is ready to become concrete work items.

## Required Contracts
- `issue-change-targets-declared` - Issue declares estimated change targets for parallel overlap detection

## Next Commands
- `/worktree`
